act.title: National Library and Documentation Services Board Act

statutoryBodies.name: National Library and Documentation Services Board
statutoryBodies.statusNote: Established under Section 2 as a body corporate with perpetual succession. Able to sue and be sued. The Board is the governing body for the National Library and Documentation Centre in Colombo. Currently under review by SLLA for its first major revision since 1998.

exOfficio.note: Principal Executive Officer and Secretary to the Board (Section 13)

nominated.role: Members appointed by the Minister of Education
nominated.note: Six members appointed by the Minister — notably, no legal requirement for library professionals (Section 3)

meetings.location: National Library and Documentation Centre, Colombo
meetings.reporting: Annual report to the Minister of Education (Section 25)

powers: Assess the need for and promote library/documentation services nationwide (Section 4)
Administer the National Library and Documentation Centre (Section 4)
Advise the Minister on library development plans (Section 4)
Initiate research and formulate national library standards (Section 4)
Apply property and financial assets towards its goals (Section 11)
dataGaps: Current Board membership — names and professional backgrounds of the six ministerially-appointed members
Whether any appointed members are library professionals (not legally required)
Meeting frequency and minutes not publicly accessible
Working committees currently constituted under Section 8
Regulations made by the Minister under Section 29

statutoryBodies.name: National Library and Documentation Centre
statutoryBodies.statusNote: The physical National Library established in Colombo under Section 12, placed under the direct management and control of the Board. Located at No. 14, Independence Avenue, Colombo 07.

exOfficio.note: Principal Executive Officer managing the Centre (Section 13)

powers: House and manage the national collection of books, documents, and publications
Provide library and documentation services to the public
Serve as the national repository and bibliographic centre
dataGaps: Size of the current collection (books, periodicals, manuscripts)
Digital services and online catalogue status

statutoryBodies.name: Director-General of the National Library
statutoryBodies.statusNote: Principal Executive Officer of the Board and Secretary to the Board. Appointed by the Board under Section 13. Exercises powers delegated by the Board under Section 17.

exOfficio.note: Appointed by the Board as principal Executive Officer (Section 13)

powers: Act as principal Executive Officer of the Board (Section 13)
Serve as Secretary to the Board (Section 13)
Exercise delegated powers from the Board (Section 17)
Custody of the Board's official seal (Section 18)
dataGaps: Current Director-General identity and appointment date
Scope of powers currently delegated under Section 17

timeline.event: Sri Lanka National Library Services Board Act enacted
timeline.details: Act No. 17 of 1970 established the original National Library Services Board. This was the foundational act that drove the initial conceptualization of a national library system.

timeline.event: National Library and Documentation Services Board Act enacted
timeline.details: Act No. 51 of 1998 replaced the 1970 Act entirely. Rebranded the Board to include 'Documentation Services', vastly expanded its powers, and provided the legal basis for operating the physical National Library and Documentation Centre. 34 sections across 6 parts.

The Sri Lanka Library Association (SLLA) and government sub-committees launched the 'Project on Revising the present NLDSB Act', identifying deficiencies including missing core objectives and the lack of mandatory library professional representation on the Board.

tiers.name: Minister of Education
tiers.relationship: Overriding powers in relation to the Board's directives (Section 23); appoints Board members (Section 3); makes regulations (Section 29)

tiers.name: National Library and Documentation Services Board
tiers.relationship: Body corporate governing library and documentation services; administers the Centre (Sections 2-11)

tiers.name: Director-General
tiers.relationship: Principal Executive Officer and Secretary to the Board (Section 13); exercises delegated powers (Section 17)

tiers.name: Working Committees
tiers.relationship: Appointed by the Board to assist with specific functions (Section 8)

tiers.name: National Library and Documentation Centre
tiers.relationship: Physical facility in Colombo under the Board's management and control (Section 12)

currentReplacement.national: National Library and Documentation Services Board (body corporate, Independence Avenue, Colombo 07)
